who: logistics managers in e-commerce companies processing 10-50 invoices/week
offer: For logistics managers in e-commerce companies processing 10-50 invoices/week, inconsistent supplier delivery confirmations cause late orders. We consolidate delivery confirmations and generate variance reports instead of manual tracking.
problem: Inconsistent supplier delivery confirmations lead to late orders.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for logistics managers
Indie Hackers discussions on similar workflows
DM outreach to logistics managers with demo video
Community forums for sharing logistics tools
try_it: Let users try manual entry of delivery confirmations and weekly variance report generation on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: 1-page landing page with the one-liner and CTA
Short demo video showing the manual-first workflow
Collect 10 short interviews from target users
Offer early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Post a weekly progress update in a relevant community
automation_simplification_ideas: One-click export of a simple report
